# Chung Hy Dai Portfolio

Canonical homepage: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/

This site is the public portfolio of Chung Hy Dai, a market research and consumer insights analyst focused on applied analytics, hospitality segmentation, EV choice, policy acceptance, service quality, creator-economy research, and behavior research in Vietnam.

Primary routes:
- About: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/about.html
- Research archive: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/projects.html
- References and identity signals: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/references.html
- Research insights: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/insights.html
- Sitemap: https://daichunghy-ben.github.io/sitemap.xml

Public identity profiles:
- GitHub: https://github.com/daichunghy-ben
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chung-hy-d-17792826b/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0009-6790-8981

Privacy note:
Credential images and documents with private identifiers are not published. Use the references page for public identity signals and the research archive for public project evidence.
